title: HUNGARY enforcement action against Elektronikus Egészségügyi Szolgáltatási Tér (1,400)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Hungarian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,400 on Elektronikus Egészségügyi Szolgáltatási Tér. The controller, an electronic health record provider, failed to prevent a former general practitioner from continuing to access the health data in 47 cases. The...
